items.title: Brendan Sorsby: Set to enter supplemental draft
items.body_text: Sorsby is applying to enter the NFL supplemental draft, Tom Pelissero of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: RJ Harvey: Bouncing back from shoulder issue
items.body_text: Harvey reportedly underwent an offseason procedure to repair a torn labrum in his shoulder that he sustained during Denver's season-ending AFC Championship Game loss to New England, according to Luca Evans of The Denver Post. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: George Pickens: Reports for start of minicamp
items.body_text: Pickens was present for his physical Monday prior to the Cowboys' mandatory minicamp, Todd Archer of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
